confirm.title: Confirm Action
confirm.message: Are you sure you want to proceed?

regenFeedback.title: Regeneration Feedback
regenFeedback.message: Provide guidance for the next generation. This will be included as an OOC instruction.
regenFeedback.placeholder: e.g. Make the response shorter, focus on dialogue, change the tone to be more playful...

chatPicker.title: Resume Chat · {{name}}
chatPicker.freshChatSubtitle: No long-term memories from prior chats
chatPicker.freshChatTitle: Starts a new chat that does not pull in documents or memory from this character's other chats. World books and personality still apply.
chatPicker.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

configureDrawerTabs.title: Configure Tabs
configureDrawerTabs.subtitle: Drag to reorder sidebar tabs. Toggle to hide optional tabs; core tabs always remain visible.
configureDrawerTabs.sidebarDescription: Drag to reorder. Core tabs stay visible but can still be moved; toggle off any tab you don't use often.
configureDrawerTabs.extensionDescription: Extension-provided tabs render after the built-in tabs in the sidebar. Drag to reorder or hide individually.
configureDrawerTabs.coreLockedHint: Always visible so you can still reach core app sections.

bulkImport.title: Bulk Import
bulkImport.skipDuplicates: Skip characters that already exist (by name)

expressionsImport.title: Imported Expressions
expressionsImport.intro: The following characters had expression mappings bundled in their CHARX files. Would you like to enable expressions for them?

alternateFieldsSummary.title: Lumiverse Features Imported
alternateFieldsSummary.intro: The following Lumiverse-specific features were imported with your characters. You can manage them in the character editor.

importWorldBook.title: Import World Book
importWorldBook.dropZone: Drop a JSON file here or click to browse
importWorldBook.dropZoneSub: Supports standard world book / lorebook format

regexImport.title: Import Regex Scripts
regexImport.dropZone: Drop a JSON file here or click to browse

memberVoice.title: Voice — {{name}}
memberVoice.hintWithDefault: Override {{name}}'s voice for this chat only. Leave unset to use the character's default voice.
memberVoice.hintGlobal: Override {{name}}'s voice for this chat only. Leave unset to use the global default.

imagePromptPreview.title: Preview & Edit Image Prompt
imagePromptPreview.subtitle: This is the prompt that will be sent to the image generator. Edit it freely — the parser will be skipped on confirm.

componentCssReference.title: CSS Selectors
componentCssReference.empty: No classes or variables found for {{name}}.
componentCssReference.scopeHint: Per-component CSS is applied globally. Scope selectors or variables to this root to target only {{name}}.
componentCssReference.hashedHint: These names describe the source stylesheet, but rendered class names may be hashed. Prefer component-root variables when available.

customCss.title: Theme Editor
customCss.importBundle: Import .lumitheme bundle or legacy JSON pack
customCss.tsxNotice: Editing <1>{{name}}</1> — interpreted safe TSX subset; arbitrary JavaScript is not executed.
customCss.tsxDisabledNote: TSX overrides were imported disabled for manual review ({{count}}).
customCss.importFailed: Failed to import bundled theme assets
customCss.resetMessage: This will clear all custom CSS and component overrides. Your theme colors will be kept. This cannot be undone.

dryRun.title: Prompt Dry Run
dryRun.budgetInvalid: (budget invalid — context size ≤ reserved response tokens)
dryRun.budgetNoHistory: Budget cannot fit any chat history
dryRun.budgetNoHistoryDetail: input budget = max_context ({{max}}) − max_tokens ({{reserved}}) − safety ({{safety}}) = {{input}}. Raise Context Size or lower Max Tokens.
dryRun.fixedOverBudget: Fixed prompt overhead already exceeds the budget
dryRun.fixedNoHistoryRoom: Fixed prompt overhead leaves no room for chat history
dryRun.fixedNoHistoryDetail: Chat history is the only clip-eligible section. System prompt, WI, persona, and other fixed blocks stay in the prompt, leaving {{remaining}} tokens for history.
dryRun.fixedOverBy: Fixed overhead is over budget by {{count}} tokens.

promptItemizer.title: Prompt Breakdown
promptItemizer.empty: No breakdown data available for this message.
promptItemizer.missingChat: Missing chat context — open this modal from an active chat.
promptItemizer.rawCaveat: Re-assembled from current state. May differ from the original send — chat variables, world-info state, preset, persona, and character edits can drift between then and now.
promptItemizer.messageBoundaryNotice: Message boundaries are reconstructed from the current chat state because this older breakdown snapshot did not store the original outbound messages.
promptItemizer.tokenCountsOnly: This stored breakdown only has token counts for this block. Newly generated messages now preserve the block text for inspection here.

manageChats.title: Manage Chats
manageChats.importGroupJsonlTitle: Import group chat from SillyTavern JSONL
manageChats.noChats: No chats yet for this character.
manageChats.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
manageChats.startingChatMessage: Creating chat and preparing Memory Cortex in the background…
manageChats.bulkImportManyFailed: Failed to import {{count}} chats — first error: {{reason}}
manageChats.speakerFallback: Speaker attribution fell back to names for {{count}} message.
manageChats.speakerFallback_plural: Speaker attribution fell back to names for {{count}} messages.

groupChatCreator.scenarioPlaceholder: Enter a shared scenario for the group...
groupChatCreator.noGreetings: None of the selected characters have greetings defined.
groupChatCreator.cardMacrosHint: Controls how character-card macros like {{description}}, {{personality}}, and {{scenario}} resolve during generation.

groupSettings.title: Group Settings
groupSettings.scenarioPlaceholder: Enter a shared scenario for the group...
groupSettings.cardMacrosHint: Controls how character-card macros like {{description}}, {{personality}}, and {{scenario}} resolve during generation.
groupSettings.impersonationHint: When set, input-bar one-liner impersonation uses this preset's impersonation prompt, assistant impersonation prefill, and parameters without changing the main preset for the chat.
groupSettings.voiceHintWithDefault: Overrides {{name}}'s voice for this chat only. Leave unset to use the character's default voice.
groupSettings.voiceHintGlobal: Overrides {{name}}'s voice for this chat only. Leave unset to use the global default voice.
groupSettings.narratorHint: Overrides the narrator voice for narration segments in this chat. Falls back to the global narrator voice (or speech voice) when unset.

worldBookEditor.selectOrCreate: Select a world book or create a new one
worldBookEditor.title: World Books
worldBookEditor.deleteBookMessage: Delete this book and all its entries? This cannot be undone.
worldBookEditor.deleteEntryMessage: Delete this entry? This cannot be undone.
worldBookEditor.convertNoneEligible: No entries are eligible for conversion. All non-constant entries are either already vectorized, empty, or disabled.
worldBookEditor.convertConfirm: This will enable vector activation for {{count}} {{entryWord}} and immediately start reindexing.

globalAddons.title: Global Add-Ons Library
globalAddons.empty: No global add-ons yet. Global add-ons can be attached to any persona, making them reusable across your entire library.
globalAddons.contentPlaceholder: Add-on content (appended to persona description when enabled)...

personaAddons.title: Persona Add-Ons
personaAddons.saveAttachmentFailed: Failed to save global add-on attachment
personaAddons.personaSectionHint: These defaults are used when a chat has no binding or chat-specific override.
personaAddons.personaEmpty: No persona-specific add-ons. These are exclusive to this persona.
personaAddons.globalEmpty: No global add-ons attached. Attach from your library to reuse across personas.
personaAddons.contentPlaceholder: Add-on content (appended to persona description when enabled)...

regexEditor.title: Regex Script Editor
regexEditor.replacePlaceholder: Leave empty to delete matches, or use $1, $& and HTML
regexEditor.name: Name
regexEditor.enterPatternHint: Enter a find pattern above to see results
regexEditor.saveErrorCharacterScope: Open a character chat before saving a character-scoped regex
regexEditor.saveErrorChatScope: Open a chat before saving a chat-scoped regex

group1.hint: Insert captured group 1 (first set of parentheses)

span.hint: Wrap group 1 in a span (add your CSS class)

postImportWorldBook.title: Choose where "{{name}}" should be active
postImportWorldBook.intro: Standalone imports stay unattached until you pick a target.
postImportWorldBook.introSubtle: You can attach this lorebook to a character, tie it to the active persona, or make it globally available.
postImportWorldBook.characterMetaActive: Attach this lorebook to the character you are currently chatting with.
postImportWorldBook.characterMetaInactive: Open a character chat first, then attach the lorebook here.
postImportWorldBook.personaMetaActive: Use this lorebook whenever this persona is active.
postImportWorldBook.personaMetaInactive: Set an active persona first if you want the lorebook to follow that persona.
postImportWorldBook.globalMeta: Make this lorebook available in every chat until you remove it from global books.
postImportWorldBook.footerHint: You can still attach it later from the character, persona, or world-book panel.
postImportWorldBook.errorAttachCharacter: Failed to attach book to the current character
postImportWorldBook.errorAttachPersona: Failed to attach book to the active persona
postImportWorldBook.errorAddGlobal: Failed to add book to global world books

memoryCortexDiagnostics.title: Memory Cortex Diagnostics
memoryCortexDiagnostics.timeoutSummary: Diagnostics request timed out before the server finished the live health checks.
memoryCortexDiagnostics.loadFailed: Failed to load Memory Cortex diagnostics.
memoryCortexDiagnostics.subtitle: Focused health checks for cortex setup, embeddings, sidecar readiness, and the selected chat.
memoryCortexDiagnostics.subtitleNoChat: Open this from an active chat for chat-specific checks.
memoryCortexDiagnostics.noChatSelected: No chat was selected when this popup was opened.
memoryCortexDiagnostics.chatNotFound: The requested chat could not be found.

errors.backendWaiting: The backend health endpoint was still waiting on one or more live provider probes.

loomSelector.noItems: No items available. Import packs in the Browser tab.
loomSelector.narrativeStyleSubtitle: Choose writing styles to shape the narrative voice
loomSelector.loomUtilitySubtitle: Choose utility prompts for enhanced output control
loomSelector.retrofitSubtitle: Choose retrofits to augment character behavior

lumiaSelector.noItems: No Lumia items available. Import packs in the Browser tab.
lumiaSelector.definitionSubtitle: Choose the physical form for your Lumia
lumiaSelector.behaviorSubtitle: Choose behavioral traits for your Lumia
lumiaSelector.personalitySubtitle: Choose personality traits for your Lumia
lumiaSelector.chimeraDefinitionSubtitle: Choose multiple physical forms to fuse into a Chimera
lumiaSelector.chimeraBehaviorSubtitle: Choose one behavioral trait for the Chimera
lumiaSelector.chimeraPersonalitySubtitle: Choose one personality trait for the Chimera

worldBookIndex.bodyOne: The selected lorebook is set up for vector activation, but it does not have an index yet. Index it now so vector lookup is ready as soon as this lorebook is attached to chat context.
worldBookIndex.bodyMany: The selected lorebooks are set up for vector activation, but they do not have an index yet. Index them now so vector lookup is ready as soon as these lorebooks are attached to chat context.
worldBookIndex.cancelHintOne: Cancel keeps this lorebook unattached so you can pick a different one.
worldBookIndex.cancelHintMany: Cancel keeps these lorebooks unattached so you can pick different ones.
worldBookIndex.toastFailedOne: A lorebook could not be indexed automatically.
worldBookIndex.toastFailedMany: {{count}} lorebooks could not be indexed automatically.
